Hero.title: Hi, I'm Ania
Hero.subtitle: I design and build web applications from React and Next.js interfaces to backend architecture, deployment and growing toward AI and software engineering.

About.title: About
About.intro: I build modern web applications focused on minimalism, usability and thoughtful user experiences.
About.p1: Since 2021, I’ve been growing as a self-taught full-stack developer. I bridge the gap between polished frontend design, solid backend logic, and server configuration.
About.p2: I learn mostly through hands-on projects, experimenting with new technologies and solving real problems. I also use AI tools in my workflow to prototype faster and improve development efficiency.
About.hobby_1: Running, SUP and everything that helps me recharge away from the screen
About.hobby_2: I enjoy creative activities like macramé and crocheting
About.hobby_3: Before frontend development, I spent a lot of time learning algorithms and C++

Projects.title: Projects
Projects.savewave_desc: A personal finance web application built mainly to better understand backend architecture, MVC patterns, and building larger applications from scratch.
Projects.savewave_h1: Custom lightweight MVC framework built in PHP
Projects.savewave_h3: Receipt scanning using local Tesseract OCR
Projects.savewave_slide_dash: The main dashboard is the first thing a user sees after logging in. It features a prominent display of the current balance. Below, a section for savings goals includes progress bars and quick access to the goals panel. Further down, three distinct lists display recent income, expenses, and goal contributions, allowing users to navigate directly to detailed views. The left sidebar provides navigation to all app modules, alongside quick-access buttons for adding new income or expenses.
Projects.savewave_slide_balance: The Balance view offers a comprehensive analysis of all financial flows in one place. Three interactive donut charts present income by source, expenses by category, and savings goal contributions. Below, a unified transaction table aggregates data from all modules, featuring a filter panel that allows users to sort transactions by date.
Projects.savewave_slide_ocr: This expense form is integrated with an OCR module and a category limit system. Tesseract processes receipts locally on the server, ensuring data never leaves the application. The system displays real-time budget status for the selected category, including the total limit, amount spent, and remaining budget.
Projects.savewave_slide_goals: A savings goal tracker with a detailed view. Each goal features a progress bar, current progress against the target, remaining amount, and a deadline. A side panel shows contribution history and enables users to add new payments without leaving the current view.
Projects.savewave_slide_mvc: The application is built on a custom MVC framework written from scratch in PHP, without external dependencies. Every HTTP request passes through a Router and a three-stage Middleware Pipeline (session authentication, CSRF validation, and logging) before reaching the appropriate Controller. A Dependency Injection container with autowiring manages dependencies across the entire application, while the Tesseract OCR module runs exclusively server-side as an isolated service.
Projects.keeper-app_desc: Keeper is a note-taking and organization app with AI integration. The project was created while learning React, full-stack architecture, and application deployment using Docker, PM2, and Nginx on a DigitalOcean server.
Projects.keeper-app_h3: Deployment using Docker, PM2, and Nginx
Projects.keeper-app_slide_dash: Clean interface with a responsive notes grid that allows users to quickly create, edit, and organize daily information and reminders.
Projects.keeper-app_slide_ai: Groq AI integration enables note analysis, suggestion generation, idea expansion, and interactive conversations with an intelligent chatbot. Each note includes its own action button that sends the content directly to the AI model for instant assistance and idea development.
Projects.keeper-app_slide_settings: Settings panel providing full account control, including data export and permanent account deletion options.
Projects.anavers_desc: My portfolio website built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS, with multilingual support.
Projects.anavers_h1: Flash-free dark/light mode on initial load (next-themes)
Projects.anavers_h2: Full PL/EN internationalization with automatic language detection (next-intl)
Projects.anavers_h3: Entry and scroll-triggered animations via Framer Motion
Projects.anavers_slide_dark: The site supports both dark and light mode. The toggle in the navbar switches themes instantly without a page reload. Thanks to next-themes, there is no flash of wrong theme on first load. The site always renders in the user's preferred mode.
Projects.anavers_slide_en: The site is fully available in Polish and English. The language switcher in the navbar changes the language without a page reload. Translations are handled by next-intl, and locale-based routing automatically detects the user's browser language.
Projects.anavers_slide_modal: Project modal with detailed description, highlights list, and a Tech Stack panel. Screenshot gallery with arrow navigation and dot indicators. Slides can contain both screenshots and architecture diagrams.
